description: Synthesizes raw physical SQLite telemetry (HR, breathing, HRV, Temp, SpO2) into clinical-grade sleep summaries and holistic Ayurvedic health insights.

occupant_id.description: Target registered household member id (e.g. target-1 for Sachin).

vata_imbalance.description: High variability in heart rate (high HRV fluctuations) and rapid, shallow breathing (> 20 RPM) under sleep stress indicators.

pitta_imbalance.description: Elevated metabolic indices (body temp average > 36.9 C) combined with elevated average sleeping resting heart rate (> 75 BPM).

kapha_imbalance.description: Low baseline heart rate (< 55 BPM) accompanied by heavy, slow respiration (< 10 RPM) and prolonged resting immobility periods.

execution_pipeline.name: Query SQLite Telemetry
execution_pipeline.description: Pull last N days averages and variances from SQLite databases for the target family member.
execution_pipeline.action: sqlite3 wifi_guardian.db "SELECT AVG(heart_rate), AVG(breathing_rate), AVG(hrv), AVG(temp), AVG(spo2) FROM vital_snapshots WHERE occupant_id = '{{occupant_id}}' AND timestamp >= (strftime('%s', 'now') - {{duration_days}}*86400)*1000;"

execution_pipeline.name: Map Dosha Imbalances
execution_pipeline.description: Apply trigger logic matrices to classify current health alignments into Vata, Pitta, or Kapha states.

execution_pipeline.name: Generate Ayurvedic Health Protocol
execution_pipeline.description: Formulate dynamic wellness recommendations, aligned to seasonal rhythms (Dinacharya), including specific pranayama (breathing) and meditation advice.
